src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove the call to setComment on the Cookie object as it is likely deprecated or removed in the target Spring Boot version.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: Compilation error due to removed or deprecated API in Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 10.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() for the first element access.
Replace deprecated List.add(int index, E element) with List.addFirst(E e) to align with Java 21 API recommendations.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: List.add(int, E) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used on List implementations that support addFirst/addLast, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if -Werror is enabled.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int index) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API recommendations.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used on List implementations that support getFirst/getLast, causing deprecation warnings or compile errors if -Werror is enabled.
